name: gert-markdown-fuzz
description: Headless harness + fuzzer for Gert's in-house markdown renderer. Node is used ONLY here (and ONLY for fuzzing this part) - the renderer itself ships no-npm, no-build ESM to the browser. ZERO runtime dependencies: the DOM is a hand-rolled shim (lib/dom-shim.ts) and the only Node built-ins used are worker_threads / module / fs / path / url.

scripts.all: node selftest.ts && node check.ts && node fuzz.ts --time 20 && node proto/compare.ts
